memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  from Cokayne's Complete Peerage, 2nd Edition, Vol. V, (Erdington), p. 88, footnote (a)

Thomas Corbet, of Moreton was born in 1281 or 1285, and died in 1310, leaving son and heir Robert. Robert* …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Corbet於1304年12月25日出生在英國史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛時，他的父親Thomas Corbet23歲，母親Amicia Hughes19歲。他於大約1329年與Elizabeth Le Strange在英國英格蘭史洛普爾沙波利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1375年12月3日在英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特享年70歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾阿爾波波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Corbet于1304年12月25日出生在英国史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛时，他的父亲Thomas Corbet23岁，母亲Amicia Hughes19岁。他于大约1329年与Elizabeth Le Strange在英国英格兰史洛普爾沙波利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1375年12月3日在英国史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特享年70岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾阿爾波波利。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Corbet was born on 25 December 1304, in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, his father, Thomas Corbet, was 23 and his mother, Amicia Hughes, was 19. He married Elizabeth Le Strange about 1329, in Shawbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 3 December 1375, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Alberbury, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Corbet est né le 25 décembre 1304, à Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Corbet, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Amicia Hughes, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Le Strange environ 1329, à Shawbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 3 décembre 1375, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Alberbury, Shropshire, Angleterre.

Er hat um 1329 in Shawbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Le Strange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Dezember 1375 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England und wurde in Alberbury, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Corbet è nato il il 25 dicembre 1304 nel Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Corbet, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Amicia Hughes, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Le Strange circa 1329, nel Shawbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 3 dicembre 1375, nel Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Alberbury, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Corbetが1304年12月25日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアワットレスボロウで生まれた時，父Thomas Corbetは23歳，母Amicia Hughesは19歳であった。約1329年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシャウブリーでElizabeth Le Strangeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1375年12月3日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで70歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアアルバーブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Corbet(이)가 1304년 12월 25일 영국 슈럽실르 왓틀레스버루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Corbet(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Amicia Hughes(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1329년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 쇼버이에서 Elizabeth Le Strange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1375년 12월 3일 영국 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 알버버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Corbet nasceu em 25 de dezembro de 1304, em Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Corbet, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Amicia Hughes, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Le Strange aproximadamente 1329, em Shawbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de dezembro de 1375, em Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Alberbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Corbet родился 25 декабря 1304 г. в местности ваттлесбороую, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Corbet было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Amicia Hughes, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Le Strange около 1329 г. в местности шавбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 3 декабря 1375 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности альбирбури, шропшир, Англия.

Se casó con Elizabeth Le Strange aproximadamente 1329, en Shawbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 3 de diciembre de 1375, en Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Alberbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
